item.title: 监督分类和回归中的特征选择和工程 | Feature selection and Engineering in supervised classification and regression
item.description:
发表于 6 月 30 日

特征选择是从数据集中识别和选择最相关特征的过程。

  • 相关特征是最有可能预测目标变量的特征。
  • 不相关的特征是那些不能预测目标变量或给数据添加噪声的特征。
  • 特征选择可以通过减少过度拟合和提高模型的可解释性来提高机器学习模型的性能。
  • 有许多不同的特征选择方法可用，每种方法都有自己的优点和缺点。

    • 监督学习是机器学习的一种，其中模型是在标记数据的数据集上进行训练的。 标记数据由成对的输入和输出组成，其中输入是特征向量，输出是标量值。

  • 分类是一种监督学习，其目标是预测输入的类别。 该类是一个分类变量，例如“红色”或“蓝色”。
  • 回归是一种监督学习，其目标是预测连续值。 连续值可以是从数字到概率的任何值。
  • 监督学习算法是在标记数据的数据集上进行训练的。 该算法学习输入和输出之间的关系，然后使用这种关系对新数据进行预测。
  • 有许多不同的监督学习算法可用，每种算法都有自己的优点和缺点。 一些最常见的监督学习算法包括：
  • 决策树
  • 支持向量机
  • 随机森林
  • 神经网络

    • 一旦被暂停，cynid3301 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

    一旦解除暂停，cynid3301 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，cynid3301 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 cynid3301 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 cynid3301：

    使 cynid3301 的所有帖子不那么明显

    举报其他不当行为

    取消标记 cynid3301 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    cynid3301

    Posted on Jun 30

    - Feature selection and engineering:

    • Feature selection is a process of identifying and selecting the most relevant features from a dataset.
    • Relevant features are those that are most likely to be predictive of the target variable.
    • Irrelevant features are those that are not predictive of the target variable or that add noise to the data.
    • Feature selection can improve the performance of machine learning models by reducing overfitting and improving the interpretability of the models.
    • There are a number of different feature selection methods available, each with its own advantages and disadvantages.

    - Classification and regression using supervised learning

    • Supervised learning is a type of machine learning where the model is trained on a dataset of labeled data. The labeled data consists of pairs of inputs and outputs, where the input is a vector of features and the output is a scalar value.
    • Classification is a type of supervised learning where the goal is to predict the class of an input. The class is a categorical variable, such as "red" or "blue".
    • Regression is a type of supervised learning where the goal is to predict a continuous value. The continuous value can be anything from a number to a probability.
    • Supervised learning algorithms are trained on a dataset of labeled data. The algorithm learns the relationship between the inputs and outputs, and then uses this relationship to make predictions on new data.
    • There are many different supervised learning algorithms available, each with its own strengths and weaknesses. Some of the most common supervised learning algorithms include:
    • Decision trees
    • Support vector machines
    • Random forests
    • Neural networks

    Once suspended, cynid3301 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, cynid3301 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by cynid3301 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If cynid3301 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag cynid3301:

    Make all posts by cynid3301 less visible

    cynid3301 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging cynid3301 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: cynid3301
